items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Razer’s Minecraft Edition of the Cobra wired gaming mouse down to $39.99 shipped. This is regularly a $60 unit that has only seen a handful of discounts to date since its debut. Today’s deal marks the steepest discount we’ve tracked for it to date, with a 33% markdown landing it $2 below its previous all-time low. We’ve seen the standard variant and even the Pokémon edition model go for less in the past, but this is the first time we’re seeing this model hit this price. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re in the market to buy something unique for your battlestation, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
